full_text:
Wei Xu 魏續
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Xu (魏續). At first an officer of Lü Bu, he later joined Cao Cao. Killed by Yan Liang. Wei Xu was affiliated with Lu Bu and the Wei Kingdom.
